title: begonia bartlettiana
intro: Begonia bartlettiana, also known as Bartlett's begonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Begonia bartlettiana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for medicinal use by making a tea or infusion, and it can also be found in herbal supplements and tinctures.
